mapper.sql: id, sender_id, receiver_id, pet_id, content, image_url, is_read, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (sender_id, receiver_id, pet_id, content, image_url) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{petId}, #{content}, #{imageUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM chat_message WHERE pet_id = #{petId} AND ((sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1})) ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT m.* FROM chat_message m WHERE m.id IN ( SELECT MAX(m2.id) FROM chat_message m2 WHERE m2.sender_id = #{userId} OR m2.receiver_id = #{userId} GROUP BY m2.pet_id, CASE WHEN m2.sender_id = #{userId} THEN m2.receiver_id ELSE m2.sender_id END ) ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_message WHERE pet_id = #{petId} AND ((sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1}))
